title: salvia betulifolia var. betulifolia
intro: Salvia betulifolia var. betulifolia, also known as Willow-leaf Sage, is a plant species belonging to the mint family, characterized by its distinctive willow-like leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Salvia betulifolia var. betulifolia include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to harness its medicinal properties.
